form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Q Parklands over 710m. Last start finished 2nd on April 2 over 710m at Q Parklands behind Starfire Tears beaten 0.8 lengths (41.41) in a OPEN. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.
